responsibilities: • establish and manage ca practice in line with icai regulations   • deliver services includin g audit, taxation, accounting, and advisory   • build and manage a diversified client portfolio   • oversee firm operations, staffing, training, and quality control   • ensure ethical standards, peer review, and compliance requirements   • develop business development str ategies and partnerships   • represent clients before tax and regulatory authorities
qualifications: • qualified ca with certificate of practice (cop)   • strong technical knowledge and leadership skills   • client acquisition and relationship management capability
